prestazioni: Engine: Ford 4V Modular 4.6L V8 (Engine Code: 2R246) with forged internals including Manley H-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and a billet crankshaft from Eagle Specialty Products. Supercharged via a Vortech V-3 Si-Trim centrifugal supercharger (8 psi boost) with a custom intercooler setup featuring a PWR North America heat exchanger and dual 1000 CFM Bosch injectors.

Drivetrain: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch and a Ford Racing 3.73:1 limited-slip differential. Custom driveshaft from Inland Empire Driveline with upgraded CV joints and a billet aluminum tailshaft housing.

Suspension & Braking: Full Air Lift Performance 3P management with AccuAir E-Level sensors, paired with KW Variant 3 coilovers (custom valving for Marauder chassis). Braking system includes Baer 6P 6-piston calipers with 14-inch two-piece rotors up front and 4-piston rear calipers with 13-inch rotors, utilizing Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Body: Full RK Sport widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser. Rear spoiler is a custom 1-piece carbon fiber unit from APR Performance (GT-500 style, 3-degree adjustable). Front bumper features a custom mesh grille with LED DRLs from Diode Dynamics.

Wheels & Tires: Forged 20x10 ET15 front and 20x11 ET25 rear wheels from HRE Performance (FF03 model, brushed titanium finish). Tire setup includes Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/30/20 front, 305/25/20 rear) with custom offset fender flares to accommodate the staggered fitment.

Interior: Full custom interior by Katzkin featuring Alcantara headliner, Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (with Schroth 6-point harnesses), and a custom roll cage from The Chassis Shop (MIG-welded 4130 chromoly, bolt-in design). Dashboard includes a custom digital gauge cluster from AEM (CD-7 dash) with integrated boost, AFR, and oil pressure sensors.
